message:
chore: ignore FrankenSuite sub-project stray test artifact dirs

Add gitignore entries for franken_decision/false/,
franken_evidence/false/, and franken_kernel/false/ directories
that get created as test artifact residue from FrankenSuite
integration runs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -139,3 +139,8 @@ output.txt
 
 # Standalone bug reproduction / debugging harnesses
 src/channel/deadlock_test.rs
+
+# FrankenSuite sub-project stray test artifact dirs
+franken_decision/false/
+franken_evidence/false/
+franken_kernel/false/
